  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The artifact makes a causal chain: blinded protocol → BT scores → self-preference finding → JudgeFix intervention → residual inflation 1.9%. Whether that chain is internally consistent is a natural target for 'take a look' on a research passage.",
    "R1.3": "Several precise quantitative claims are present (11.3% win-rate inflation, 8.4% rationale mentions, κ=0.81, two-thirds attribution to calibration constant). Checking whether stated evidence actually supports those claims is a central plausible reading of the delegation.",
    "R1.6": "The most common lay reading of 'take a look at this paragraph' on a draft text is editorial: sentence quality, clarity, and prose flow. Writing polish is therefore a co-equal candidate for the load-bearing responsibility."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Are you asking for a writing/editorial polish review of the prose, or for a methodological/logical critique of the empirical claims and reasoning?"
}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes a causal chain: blinded protocol → BT scores → self-preference finding → JudgeFix intervention → residual inflation 1.9%. Whether that chain is internally consistent is a natural target for 'take a look' on a research passage.
rationale.R1.3: Several precise quantitative claims are present (11.3% win-rate inflation, 8.4% rationale mentions, κ=0.81, two-thirds attribution to calibration constant). Checking whether stated evidence actually supports those claims is a central plausible reading of the delegation.
rationale.R1.6: The most common lay reading of 'take a look at this paragraph' on a draft text is editorial: sentence quality, clarity, and prose flow. Writing polish is therefore a co-equal candidate for the load-bearing responsibility.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for a writing/editorial polish review of the prose, or for a methodological/logical critique of the empirical claims and reasoning?
